prompt: A long, narrow corridor stretches into the distance, its concrete floor cracked and littered with small debris. The walls, once painted a pale gray, are now heavily weathered, with large patches of paint peeling away to reveal the rough texture beneath. Rusty metal railings line both sides of the walkway, their surfaces corroded and bent. At the far end, a set of escalators ascends toward a brightly lit exit, their steps dark and shadowed. A single, old-fashioned arcade machine stands abandoned on the left, its screen dark and its casing dented. The ceiling is lined with fluorescent lights, casting a cold, even glow that highlights the decay. The scene feels quiet and forgotten, as if time has stood still in this forgotten space. As the perspective shifts forward, the focus tightens on the escalators, drawing the viewer’s eye upward toward the light beyond. The railings and walls blur slightly, emphasizing the sense of movement toward the exit. The arcade machine recedes into the background, becoming a memory of a time long past. The overall atmosphere is one of quiet desolation, a place where the past lingers in the cracks and rust.
